toast.scanQr: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator

mfa.title: Multi-factor authentication (TOTP)
mfa.enabled: MFA is enabled on your account.
mfa.disabled: Protect your account with a time-based one-time password.
mfa.scanApps: Scan with Google Authenticator, Authy, or Microsoft Authenticator.
mfa.confirmSetup: Enter the code from your app to confirm setup · refreshes in {{seconds}}s

recovery.title: Save these recovery codes — shown once only

password.title: Password
password.ldapHint: Your account authenticates through LDAP. Password changes must be done in your directory service.
password.oidcHint: Your account authenticates through SSO. Password changes must be done in your identity provider.

disableMfa.title: Disable MFA
disableMfa.description: Enter your password and a current authenticator code (or recovery code) to disable MFA.

passkey.title: Passkeys (WebAuthn)
passkey.hint: Use a platform or security key for passwordless step-up. Works in Chrome, Firefox, and Edge.
passkey.unsupported: WebAuthn is not supported in this browser
